title: YWCA Alaska Women of Achievement Awards Nominations Due Oct 8th
summary: Do you know an outstanding female conservationist? The YWCA is calling for nominations for their annual Women of Achievement Awards. title: SOUL Training for Trainers – Sept 15
summary: As part of ACF’s Community Capacity initiative , ACF is sponsoring staff from the Alaska Youth for Environmental Action (AYEA) program to experience SOUL’s facilitator training that uses popular education and community organizing techniques.
